entries.name: The Dawn Mirror & the binding-duty (PRIMARY QUEST)
entries.note: *Asahi no Kagami*, claimed (Sc.5), now borne by Akihiko. Not a weapon — it BINDS the deep power in captured sunlight; can cure his mark & free the taken souls. Wake it: Akihiko's Sacred sun-fire at an open dawn, by a willing soul who takes the binding as a lasting duty (Akihiko, the chain's new anchor). Immediate: deliver it safely to Lord Hatsue.

entries.name: The Mark — danger AND key (the leash)
entries.note: The power's hook in Akihiko (Marked by the Deep); CONTAINED but used as the conduit (Sc.8) to reach & sear the power — double-edged, proven both ways. The leash by which he may drag the power to the Mirror.

entries.name: The power in the deep Shinomen
entries.note: Nameless, older than the Empire & the Kami; cannot be killed, only BOUND; its one fear is the sun. STUNG (Sc.8): Akihiko ran sun-fire up a soul-thread and wounded it — first hurt in 1200 years; it now knows his fire all the way down, fixed on him.

entries.name: The taken souls of Hibari Mura
entries.note: Gathered & woven toward some purpose, NOT destroyed. PROVEN partly reclaimable (Sc.8): Akihiko's sun-fire severed one puppet-thread & freed a boy's body — the soul still in the deep (the Mirror is the full cure).

entries.name: The leak / the Scorpion closing in
entries.note: The Scorpion acted on it — and the ambush was DEFEATED, Gennai captured (Sc.9). Immediate threat foiled; but the broader word is out and the cell will react to losing him. Now entangled with the Emerald Magistrate's Scorpion investigation.

entries.name: Lord Hatsue's fraying mind
entries.note: Spending her sight on the threat; declining at home while Akihiko is away.

entries.name: The Imperial (Seppun) blood — known heritage
entries.note: No buried secret: runs through grandmother Seppun Yuki (minor Imperial scion) → Sumiko → Akihiko, and grants the house a notch of extra Falcon standing. The Dawn Mirror recognized it. Still a thing high-Status others could exploit or resent.

entries.name: The Mirror's price — the binding consumes its anchor
entries.note: Hatsue's deathbed secret (Sc.11): the Dawn Mirror doesn't hold the deep power on its own — it needs a living ANCHOR who spends their self/soul/sight keeping the chain taut (the First Yotogi, the Keeper 1200y, Hatsue's 2 years of sight). To wake & wield it, the anchor is slowly consumed. Hatsue meant that anchor to be Akihiko — 'the other inheritance.'

entries.name: The Falcon's fate — the Lion protectorate (independence vs survival)
entries.note: Karō Ujiyasu's deal: submit the Falcon as a vassal of the LION (an Akodo lord, eastern hills) — garrison, granaries, protection vs the Scorpion & the dark — for fealty/independence. Hatsue refused (she gambled on the First Ward). Deferred to morning; now Lady Chiyo's seal to give or refuse. (Note: Matsu Toshimoko is Lion.)

entries.name: What's wrong with Chiyo (iron, undone — a hidden thing)
entries.note: Iron Chiyo — 'scariest of his peers,' breaks Lions' noses without flinching — came undone at the deathbed in a way that is NOT mere grief. Akihiko failed to read it (Sc.11); something is behind a door she's never closed before. Guilt? Fear? Knowledge? A hidden thing.
